title: SeCoPPA (Calvados) Un échange fumier/luzerne entre éleveurs & céréaliers
subtitle: Présentation du groupe et de son projet
description: A collective of cereal growers and livestock farmers in Calvados has established a contractual exchange of manure for dried lucerne to enhance soil organic matter and secure forage supplies. The document outlines the group’s organisation, cultivation, harvesting, drying processes, and the agronomic and economic objectives of this crop-livestock integration initiative.
